title: Gree GMV Mini indoor wired-controller codes
description: Manual-bound malfunction list entries from the GMV Mini/System II service manual that are not already represented by existing GMV6 indoor answers.
sourceName: DC Inverter VRF System Service Manual (R410A)
sourceReference: Malfunction list for wired controller, PDF page 81 / manual page 77
notes: One-manual source boundary: SERVICE_MANUAL_GMV_MINI.pdf only. Duplicate/revision candidates were not used in ED-24H.2.
